ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the department (e.g., Department for Energy and Climate Change) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the department */,
  "budget_overview" TEXT /* Overview of the department's budget and financial goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the entity belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the entity */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the entity */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the entity */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the entity */,
  "budget_overview" TEXT /* Overview of the entity's budget and financial goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_types" (
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense type */,
  "expense_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense type (e.g., External Training, Consultancy Advice Provided From Third Parties) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the expense type (e.g., Operational, Capital) */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates if the expense is recurring */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the expense (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_areas" (
  "expense_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense area */,
  "expense_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense area (e.g., Corporate and Professional Services) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense area */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the expense area (e.g., Operational, Capital) */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates if the expense area is recurring */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the expense area (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Supplier rating (1-5) */,
  "is_preferred" INTEGER /* Indicates if the supplier is preferred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department making the transaction */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity within the department */,
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense type */,
  "expense_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense area */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "date_of_payment" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transaction */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number associated with the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Check, Wire Transfer) */,
  "is_reimbursable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the expense is reimbursable */,
  "reimbursement_status" TEXT /* Status of reimbursement (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_expense_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_area_id") REFERENCES expense_areas ("expense_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_expense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_type_id") REFERENCES expense_types ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, department manager, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity within the department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "budget_amount" REAL /* Amount of the budget */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year the budget is for */,
  "allocated_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget was allocated */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the budget */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the budget (e.g., Draft, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_budgets_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "expense_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense area */,
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense type */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of expenses */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "prepared_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who prepared the report */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who reviewed the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_reports_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_reports_expense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_type_id") REFERENCES expense_types ("expense_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_reports_expense_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_area_id") REFERENCES expense_areas ("expense_area_id")
)
